components.text:
Using the /sect info command will allow you to see your Current and Max Power like this 12/20
Sect Power is used to claim land 1 chunk cost 50 power
You can also use power to Overclaim someone elses claims! As long as you have more Max Power then the other sect and you are enemies you can Overclaim. It costs 100 power to overclaim a sect.
Using the /sect enemy [sectName] you can enemy another sect. This is Strictly required to Overclaim another sects land!
